serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (2 × 30,000 km = 60,000 km) per garage.wiki F30.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling) per garage.wiki F30.
serviceNotes.timing chain: N47 uses a timing chain; no fixed short replacement interval in OEM booklets—specialists suggest monitoring noise and guides toward high mileage (planning row ~200,000 km).
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Diesel EGR valve and intake manifold soot buildup. Cleaning around ~120,000 km can restore response and reduce EGR-related faults.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual F30
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.fuel filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — fuel filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
